languages.text: {n}Вокс-синтезатор издает горькую трель.{/n} "Я догадывался, где лежат твои амбиции... Но сговориться с врагами против собственного отца?.." {n}Не прочитав на лице дочери и капли раскаяния, Вольный Торговец вздергивает подбородок и отворачивается. Когда он отдает приказ, его голос звучит спокойно:{/n} "Сенешаль Войгтвир. Займитесь предательницей".

traits.locale_text: [draft] Себериан высказывается и говорит, что дальше судьба Ювенны в руках верной дочери. Он разбит этой новостью.

languages.text: {n}The vox-synthesiser emits a bitter trill.{/n} "I surmised where your ambitions lay... But conspiring with the enemy against your own father?" {n}Failing to find an ounce of remorse in his daughter's face, the Rogue Trader juts out his chin and turns away. When he issues the order, his voice sounds calm:{/n} "Seneschal Voigtvir. Deal with this traitor."
languages.original_text: {n}Вокс-синтезатор издает горькую трель.{/n} "Я догадывался, где лежат твои амбиции... But conspiring with the enemy against your own father?" {n}Failing to find an ounce of remorse in his daughter's face, the Rogue Trader juts out his chin and turns away. When he issues the order, his voice sounds calm:{/n} "Seneschal Voigtvir. Deal with this traitor."

languages.text: {n}Aus dem Vox-Synthesizer ertönt ein verbittertes Trillern.{/n} "Ich hatte vermutet, was Ihr bezweckt ... Aber mit dem Feind gegen Euren eigenen Vater zu konspirieren?" {n}Als er keine Spur von Bedauern im Gesicht seiner Tochter erkennt, streckt der Freihändler sein Kinn vor und wendet sich ab. Er erteilt den Befehl mit ruhiger Stimme:{/n} "Truchsessin Voigtvir. Kümmert Euch um diese Verräterin."

But conspiring with the enemy against your own father?" {n}Failing to find an ounce of remorse in his daughter's face, the Rogue Trader juts out his chin and turns away. traits.locale_text: {n}Aus dem Vox-Synthesizer ertönt ein verbittertes Trillern.{/n} "Ich hatte vermutet, was Ihr bezweckt ... Aber mit dem Feind gegen Euren eigenen Vater zu konspirieren?" {n}Als er keine Spur von Bedauern im Gesicht seiner Tochter erkennt, streckt der Freihändler sein Kinn vor und wendet sich ab. Er erteilt den Befehl mit ruhiger Stimme:{/n} "Truchsessin Voigtvir. Kümmert Euch um diese Verräterin."

languages.text: {n}音阵合成器发出一声苦涩的颤音。{/n}“我早就看出了你的野心……但你竟然勾结敌人来对付自己的父亲？”{n}行商浪人没能从女儿脸上找到一丝悔意，于是下巴一扬，转过身去。当他下达命令时，声音听上去很平静：{/n}“维特威尔总领，处理掉这个叛徒。”
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser emits a bitter trill.{/n} "I surmised where your ambitions lay... But conspiring with the enemy against your own father?" {n}Failing to find an ounce of remorse in his daughter's face, the Rogue Trader juts out his chin and turns away. When he issues the order, his voice sounds calm:{/n} "Seneschal Voigtvir. Deal with this traitor."

traits.locale_text: {n}音阵合成器发出一声苦涩的颤音。{/n}“我早就看出了你的野心……但你竟然勾结敌人来对付自己的父亲？”{n}行商浪人没能从女儿脸上找到一丝悔意，于是下巴一扬，转过身去。当他下达命令时，声音听上去很平静：{/n}“维特威尔总领，处理掉这个叛徒。”

languages.text: {n}Le synthétiseur-vox émet un trille amer.{/n} « Je peux concevoir tes ambitions... Mais conspirer avec l'ennemi contre ton propre père ? » {n}Ne discernant pas l'ombre d'un remord sur le visage de sa fille, le libre-marchand redresse le menton et se détourne d'elle. Lorsqu'il donne l'ordre, sa voix demeure calme :{/n} « Sénéchale Voigtvir, occupez-vous de cette traîtresse. »
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser emits a bitter trill.{/n} "I surmised where your ambitions lay... But conspiring with the enemy against your own father?" {n}Failing to find an ounce of remorse in his daughter's face, the Rogue Trader juts out his chin and turns away. When he issues the order, his voice sounds calm:{/n} "Seneschal Voigtvir. Deal with this traitor."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le synthétiseur-vox émet un trille amer.{/n} « Je peux concevoir tes ambitions... Mais conspirer avec l'ennemi contre ton propre père ? » {n}Ne discernant pas l'ombre d'un remord sur le visage de sa fille, le libre-marchand redresse le menton et se détourne d'elle. Lorsqu'il donne l'ordre, sa voix demeure calme :{/n} « Sénéchale Voigtvir, occupez-vous de cette traîtresse. »

languages.text: {n}El vocosintetizador emite un gorjeo de amargura.{/n} «Ya sospechaba de tu ambición, pero... ¿conspirar con el enemigo contra tu propio padre?». {n}Al no ser capaz de distinguir ni un ápice de remordimiento en el rostro de su hija, el Comerciante Independiente levanta el mentón y se da la vuelta. Su voz no tiembla al impartir la orden:{/n} «Senescal Voigtvir. Ocúpese de esta traidora».
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser emits a bitter trill.{/n} "I surmised where your ambitions lay... But conspiring with the enemy against your own father?" {n}Failing to find an ounce of remorse in his daughter's face, the Rogue Trader juts out his chin and turns away. When he issues the order, his voice sounds calm:{/n} "Seneschal Voigtvir. Deal with this traitor."

traits.locale_text: {n}El vocosintetizador emite un gorjeo de amargura.{/n} «Ya sospechaba de tu ambición, pero... ¿conspirar con el enemigo contra tu propio padre?». {n}Al no ser capaz de distinguir ni un ápice de remordimiento en el rostro de su hija, el Comerciante Independiente levanta el mentón y se da la vuelta. Su voz no tiembla al impartir la orden:{/n} «Senescal Voigtvir. Ocúpese de esta traidora».

languages.text: {n}Voks sentezleyici acı bir ses çıkarıyor.{/n} "Hırslarının nerede yattığını tahmin etmiştim... Fakat kendi babana karşı düşmanla komplo kurmak mı?" {n}Kızının yüzünde zerre kadar pişmanlık bulamayan Hür Tacir, çenesini dikleştiriyor ve başını çeviriyor. Emri verdiğinde sesi sakin çıkıyor.{/n} "Seneşal Voigtvir. Bu haine gereğini yapın."
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-synthesiser emits a bitter trill.{/n} "I surmised where your ambitions lay... But conspiring with the enemy against your own father?" {n}Failing to find an ounce of remorse in his daughter's face, the Rogue Trader juts out his chin and turns away. When he issues the order, his voice sounds calm:{/n} "Seneschal Voigtvir. Deal with this traitor."

Fakat kendi babana karşı düşmanla komplo kurmak mı?" {n}Kızının yüzünde zerre kadar pişmanlık bulamayan Hür Tacir, çenesini dikleştiriyor ve başını çeviriyor. Emri verdiğinde sesi sakin çıkıyor.{/n} "Seneşal Voigtvir. Bu haine gereğini yapın."

languages.text: {n}ヴォックス・シンセサイザーが苦々しいさえずりを発する。{/n}「お前の野心がどこにあるかは察していた…だが、自らの父に背いて敵と共謀するとは？」{n}娘の顔に一片の悔恨も見いだせず、ローグ・トレーダーは顎を突き出して顔をそむける。命令を下す彼の声は冷静だった。{/n}「家令長ヴォイグヴィル。この裏切り者を処分せよ。」

When he issues the order, his voice sounds calm:{/n} "Seneschal Voigtvir. Deal with this traitor."
